SEARCH
Package net.sourceforge.plantuml.teavm

Class SvgGraphicsTeaVM

java.lang.Object
net.sourceforge.plantuml.teavm.SvgGraphicsTeaVM
public class SvgGraphicsTeaVM extends Object
SVG Graphics implementation for TeaVM. Uses browser's native DOM API instead of javax.xml.

      public org.teavm.jso.dom.xml.Element createGroup()

      public String createLinearGradient(String id, String color1, String color2, boolean horizontal)

    • serializeToString

      public static String serializeToString(org.teavm.jso.dom.xml.Element element)
      Returns the SVG as a string (serialized XML).

    • toSvgString

      public String toSvgString()

    • initMeasureCanvas

      public static void initMeasureCanvas()
      Initializes the shared canvas for text measurement. Call once at startup for best performance.

    • measureTextCanvas

      public static double[] measureTextCanvas(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize, String fontWeight)
      Measures text dimensions using Canvas API (optimized with shared canvas).
      Parameters:
      text - The text to measure
      fontFamily - Font family (e.g., "Arial")
      fontSize - Font size in pixels
      fontWeight - Font weight (e.g., "normal", "bold")
      Returns:
      Array with [width, height]

    • measureTextCanvasNoCache

      public static double[] measureTextCanvasNoCache(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize, String fontWeight)
      Measures text dimensions using Canvas API (creates new canvas each time). Use measureTextCanvas() instead for better performance.

    • measureText

      public static double[] measureText(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize)
      Measures text using Canvas with normal weight.

    • getTextWidth

      public static double getTextWidth(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize)
      Gets text width only.

    • getTextHeight

      public static double getTextHeight(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize)
      Gets text height only.

    • measureTextSvgBBox

      public static double[] measureTextSvgBBox(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize)
      Measures text using SVG getBBox() method. More accurate but requires the SVG to be in the DOM.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to measure
      fontFamily - Font family
      fontSize - Font size in pixels
      Returns:
      Array with [width, height, x, y] from bounding box

    • getDetailedTextMetrics

      public static double[] getDetailedTextMetrics(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize, String fontWeight)
      Detailed text metrics using Canvas API. Returns more information about text positioning.
      Returns:
      Array with [width, actualBoundingBoxAscent, actualBoundingBoxDescent, fontBoundingBoxAscent, fontBoundingBoxDescent]

    • drawCenteredCharacter

      public void drawCenteredCharacter(char c, double x, double y, String fontFamily, int fontSize)
      Draws a single character centered at the specified position. Uses SVG text-anchor and dominant-baseline for centering.
      Parameters:
      c - The character to draw
      x - Center X position
      y - Center Y position
      fontFamily - Font family
      fontSize - Font size in pixels

    • drawImage

      public void drawImage(String dataUrl, double x, double y, int width, int height)
      Draws an image at the specified position using a data URL. The image is embedded directly in the SVG as a base64-encoded PNG.
      Parameters:
      dataUrl - PNG data URL (data:image/png;base64,...)
      x - X position
      y - Y position
      width - Image width
      height - Image height

    • drawSvgImage

      public void drawSvgImage(UImageSvg image, double x, double y)
      Embeds an SVG image at the specified position. The SVG content is parsed and inserted as a nested SVG element.
      Parameters:
      image - UImageSvg containing the SVG data
      x - X position
      y - Y position
